name: Current Reality Tree
description: Map cause-and-effect to find root causes of undesirable effects
systemPromptHint: UDEs should be stated as observable negative effects, not root causes. Work bottom-up: root causes feed into intermediate effects which surface as UDEs. Challenge single-cause chains — most UDEs have multiple contributing causes.

derivedIndicators.name: Root Cause
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — a fundamental driver

derivedIndicators.name: Intermediate Effect
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges
